falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 60+ within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff top formation would invalidate the 'HOLD' signal by confirming a reversal from the current pattern

falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would contradict the bottom pattern similarity (bottom_2024_aug) which typically precedes bearish consolidation

falsification_conditions.condition: The VIX index drops below 12 for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such extreme complacency would falsify the 'HOLD' signal by indicating a breakdown in volatility that contradicts the current pattern's risk profile

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
